arts.ttl: Hard-fought draw secures European spot for Mainz
arts.sum: A hard-fought 2–2 draw against Bayer Leverkusen was enough to secure European football for Mainz.

arts.ttl: Mainz vs. Bayer Leverkusen preview: Nullfünfer aim to secure European football
arts.sum: Mainz carry their chances of European football in their own hands on the final matchday as they host dethroned Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen.
